short_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, , Hazlewood misses his length and feeds it right in the slot, Neesham clears his front leg and hea
full_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, , Hazlewood misses his length and feeds it right in the slot, Neesham clears his front leg and heaves it towards long-on, not off the middle but enough to clear a leaping Maxwell

short_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, 2 runs, brilliant work from Wade but he can't run Neesham out. On a length and outside off, swiped
full_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, 2 runs, brilliant work from Wade but he can't run Neesham out. On a length and outside off, swiped to long-on and Neesham is jogging back for the second, Wade collects the throw over his head and tries to throw it onto the stumps, misses and Neesham survives

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 3 runs, streaky! But Conway won't mind how they come. He moves across to play the lap but the wide
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 3 runs, streaky! But Conway won't mind how they come. He moves across to play the lap but the wide full toss takes the outside edge and flies over short third, Neesham races back for the third

full_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, 1 run, off-pace delivery now, Neesham goes hard on the loft and mistimes it to long-off

short_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, 2 runs, another pinpoint yorker and Neesham squeezes it between his legs to short fine, Zampa make
full_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, 2 runs, another pinpoint yorker and Neesham squeezes it between his legs to short fine, Zampa makes a diving stop but the ball rolls away from him, allowing the pair to get back

short_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, no run, nails the yorker outside off, Neesham cannot dig it out and it is a dot to start the final
full_text: Hazlewood to Neesham, no run, nails the yorker outside off, Neesham cannot dig it out and it is a dot to start the final over

short_text: Starc to Conway, , good end to the over. Starc misses his yorker and it is a half volley around off, Conway backs away a
full_text: Starc to Conway, , good end to the over. Starc misses his yorker and it is a half volley around off, Conway backs away and creams the drive in front of square, splitting extra cover and mid-off perfectly

full_text: Starc to Neesham, 1 run, full toss around off, Neesham heaves it to long-on and it is only a single

full_text: Starc to Conway, 1 run, very full and close to yorker length, Conway squeezes the drive to mid-off

full_text: Starc to Conway, 2 runs, slower ball and Conway is deceived for pace, swings it backward of square leg and the long square boundary helps him, bounces just in front of a diving Stoinis and he does well to keep it to a brace

short_text: Starc to Neesham, 1 run, inswinging yorker and Neesham jams it onto his back pad, the ball rolls to the off-side and Con
full_text: Starc to Neesham, 1 run, inswinging yorker and Neesham jams it onto his back pad, the ball rolls to the off-side and Conway crosses over

full_text: Starc to Conway, 1 run, off-pace delivery outside off, Conway drives to extra cover and has to settle with a single

short_text: Cummins to Neesham, 2 runs, miscue and Neesham gets away with it. Slower short of length delivery and Neesham slices the
full_text: Cummins to Neesham, 2 runs, miscue and Neesham gets away with it. Slower short of length delivery and Neesham slices the pull towards mid-on, the ball lands in front of an incoming long-on and the pair scamper back

short_text: Cummins to Neesham, 2 runs, excellent running. Full toss outside off and Neesham tries to muscle it over the off-side, m
full_text: Cummins to Neesham, 2 runs, excellent running. Full toss outside off and Neesham tries to muscle it over the off-side, mistimes to long-off and Conway races back for the second even though it was straight to the fielder

full_text: Cummins to Conway, 1 run, goes off-pace outside off and Conway chops it square of the wicket, just a single

full_text: Cummins to Conway, , sprays the wide yorker too far outside off, no chance for Conway to reach it

full_text: Cummins to Neesham, , tries to keep it away from Neesham's range and sprays it outside off, wide called

short_text: Cummins to Neesham, , massive! Another slower ball dug into the surface and Neesham was waiting in the crease, stays dee
full_text: Cummins to Neesham, , massive! Another slower ball dug into the surface and Neesham was waiting in the crease, stays deep and pummels the pull into the deep mid-wicket stand.

full_text: Cummins to Conway, 1 run, I0$ slower ball outside off, Conway drives to sweeper cover

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 1 run, off-pace and back of a length, Conway tucks it through mid-wicket and retains strike

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 1 run, on a length and slower outside off, Conway waits and drives to sweeper cover

full_text: Stoinis to Neesham, 1 run, off-pace delivery and Neesham is through the heave early, toe-ends it towards long-on and the ball lands short of Warner

short_text: Stoinis to Conway, 1 run, slower ball bowled into the wicket, Conway pulls with the bottom hand coming off and picks out
full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 1 run, slower ball bowled into the wicket, Conway pulls with the bottom hand coming off and picks out deep square leg

short_text: Stoinis to Conway, , Conway continues to keep the scoreboard ticking. Full delivery on off-stump, Conway drives it strai
full_text: Stoinis to Conway, , Conway continues to keep the scoreboard ticking. Full delivery on off-stump, Conway drives it straight of mid-off and a dive from Warner is not enough to stop the boundary

short_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, Caught&Bowled!! The extra ball has worked out for Australia and Hazlewood. He sends back th
full_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, Caught&Bowled!! The extra ball has worked out for Australia and Hazlewood. He sends back the dangerous Phillips. Australia pulling things back here. It is that hard length once again which works for Hazlewood, he pounds it halfway down and rushes Phillips on the cross-batted shot, the ball hits the splice and balloons into the off-side, Hazlewood calls for it and runs to his left to complete the dolly.

short_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, , yorker outside off and it lands on the tramline, umpire Kumar Dharmasena signals a wide
full_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, , yorker outside off and it lands on the tramline, umpire Kumar Dharmasena signals a wide

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, I0$ slower ball around off, Conway angles it to backward point and quickly crosses over
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, I0$ slower ball around off, Conway angles it to backward point and quickly crosses over

full_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, spears it full and close to yorker length, Phillips jams it towards mid-wicket

short_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, , this time he connects. Phillips makes room and slaps the back of a length delivery back o
full_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, , this time he connects. Phillips makes room and slaps the back of a length delivery back over Hazlewood, not off the middle but with mid-off inside the ring, he just needed to get it past the infield

short_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, no run, short and pounded into the hard length, Phillips backs away and attempts the upper
full_text: Hazlewood to Glenn Phillips, no run, short and pounded into the hard length, Phillips backs away and attempts the upper cut, but there's enough bounce on this surface to take it over the top-edge. Hang on! There was no appeal from Hazlewood or Wade. But for some reason Finch has sent it upstairs. Flat-line on the UltraEdge and another review lost. Strange! No appeal but a review wasted

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, I0$ back of a length delivery, Conway short-arm jabs it to long-on
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, I0$ back of a length delivery, Conway short-arm jabs it to long-on

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 1 run, googly around leg-stump, Conway works it to square leg and retains strike

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 2 runs, wrong 'un outside off, Conway slices the drive to the left of extra cover and just evades the fielder, two more

short_text: Zampa to Conway, , tosses it up and lands it right in the slot, Conway drills the loft straight back down the ground and
full_text: Zampa to Conway, , tosses it up and lands it right in the slot, Conway drills the loft straight back down the ground and there's no stopping that

short_text: Zampa to Conway, no run, smart bowling. Zampa saw Conway making room and bowled the googly outside off, the inside out l
full_text: Zampa to Conway, no run, smart bowling. Zampa saw Conway making room and bowled the googly outside off, the inside out loft is missed and Wade removes the bails, Conway loses his balance but ensures he remains inside the crease

short_text: Zampa to Conway, , strays down leg, Conway gets inside the line and lets it pass, wide called
full_text: Zampa to Conway, , strays down leg, Conway gets inside the line and lets it pass, wide called

full_text: Zampa to Glenn Phillips, 1 run, slower and turning away, Phillips cracks it in front of square and the sweeper tidies up

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 1 run, quicker and drifted across, Conway cuts to sweeper cover and they settle with a single even though Zampa doesn't collect the throw

short_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, no run, back of a length on off, Phillips defends down the pitch
full_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, no run, back of a length on off, Phillips defends down the pitch

full_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, 2 runs, slower ball into the surface, Phillips waits and swats it off the top-edge towards fine leg, quick brace

short_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, , shot! Just a hint of width and Phillips latches onto it, he drives in front of square and b
full_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, , shot! Just a hint of width and Phillips latches onto it, he drives in front of square and beats sweeper cover comfortably

full_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, no run, attacks the stumps with a I0$ delivery, Phillips knocks it back to Cummins

full_text: Cummins to Glenn Phillips, no run, good length ball on off, Phillips defends watchfully in front of mid-off

full_text: Cummins to Conway, 3 runs, just short of Finch and it escapes past him. Fullish delivery and Conway drives uppishly towards extra cover, Finch dives forward but can't get there and the ball beats him

short_text: Zampa to Williamson, Lbw!! That is very full from Zampa and it beats Williamson's reverse-sweep to get him LBW! Williams
full_text: Zampa to Williamson, Lbw!! That is very full from Zampa and it beats Williamson's reverse-sweep to get him LBW! Williamson goes for a review with just a second left on the clock. Doesn't seem like he's got any bat on it. Just have to check whether the impact is in line, and whether it's turning too much to miss off stump. No, this is crashing into middle and off. Not the most fluent knock from Williamson who goes for a run-a-ball 23.

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 1 run, 98kph, full on leg stump, and Conway mistimes the slog-sweep to deep midwicket

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 1 run, short and wide with this googly, Conway slaps it to sweeper cover

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 2 runs, down the pitch again, Zampa pushes it flatter and Conway knocks it gently through midwicket. He's back for the second

full_text: Zampa to Conway, , he isn't to the pitch of this leg-break, but Conway hits it with the turn and swings hard to clear the midwicket boundary. That's his

full_text: Starc to Conway, 1 run, yorker at 143kph around off stump, Conway squeezes it for a single to mid-off

full_text: Starc to Conway, 1 run, 144kph yorker just outside off, Conway squeezes it wide of backward point and Warner puts in a full-stretch dive to get a hand on it. Hasn't made a clean stop though and they get across for a single

full_text: Stoinis to Williamson, , now Williamson gets into the act. He needed this boundary badly after a slow start. Full around off stump, Williamson shuffles across, bends his knees to get low and swipes it over long leg

full_text: Starc to Conway, 2 runs, slower short ball down leg, Conway helps the pull fine and they get back for an easy two as fine leg gives chase

full_text: Starc to Conway, no run, cracking yorker on off stump and Conway just about manages to dig it out. He squeezes it off a thick inside edge onto pad and it ! Finch is asking whether it was pad first. Starc isn't sure but the keeper probably has the final say and they decide against taking a review

short_text: Starc to Williamson, 1 run, short of length on off, Williamson makes some room and punches it sweetly through backward p
full_text: Starc to Williamson, 1 run, short of length on off, Williamson makes some room and punches it sweetly through backward point. It's only a single to the deep

full_text: Starc to Conway, 1 run, full around off, Conway knocks it wide of mid-off

full_text: Starc to Conway, 2 runs, slower one pitched up outside off and it's driven through the covers. Conway hasn't timed it very well though. It's only a couple of runs

full_text: Starc to Williamson, 1 run, pitched up on middle, Williamson pushes to long-on

full_text: Zampa to Conway, no run, Australia have taken a review for LBW. It's definitely pad first with Conway hiding his bat behind in defence. It turns in off a length on middle, strikes him right in front but it's ! Zampa was convinced and Finch went with him to take it upstairs, but Australia lose a review

full_text: Zampa to Conway, , New Zealand were getting into a bit of a lull, but Conway dances down and gets them out of it. Not quite to the pitch of this googly, still goes through with the shot though and hits it so clean over long-on

full_text: Zampa to Conway, no run, 93kph, drifting across middle and Conway brings out the reverse-sweep and connects. But it's straight to short third

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 2 runs, good length around leg from over the wicket, and Conway nudges it through the vacant midwicket region. Has played it gently and that allows him to get back for the second

full_text: Zampa to Conway, 1 run, flat googly on the pads, Conway nudges it through midwicket

full_text: Zampa to Conway, , this is such an ordinary delivery to start from Zampa. A half-volley on off stump as he tosses it up and Conway drills it through extra cover for four

full_text: Cummins to Conway, 1 run, short and wide, Conway cuts it to deep point

full_text: Cummins to Conway, no run, driven to cover as Cummins slants it away outside off

full_text: Cummins to Conway, , how well has he adjusted here! Conway initially looks for a scoop towards fine leg, but has to change his shot as Cummins goes very wide outside off. So he opens the face and steers it to the third man boundary

full_text: Cummins to Conway, no run, short of length delivery just outside off, Conway is cramped for room looking to cut and chops it off a thick under-edge to the keeper

full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, no run, looks to drive on the up and drags it off the inside half to midwicket

full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, , short of length just outside off, Williamson punches it sweetly off the back foot and finds the gap through backward point for four

full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, no run, short of length into the body, Williamson rides the bounce and tucks it to midwicket

full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, no run, back of a length in the channel, blocked to backward point

full_text: Hazlewood to Williamson, no run, good length just outside off, Williamson defends to backward point

short_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, Bowled!! Cleans him up with a yorker! Oh what relief for Australia as Hazlewood knocks over All
full_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, Bowled!! Cleans him up with a yorker! Oh what relief for Australia as Hazlewood knocks over Allen to end a blistering innings that has given New Zealand the perfect start here. Allen dances down again as he's done to great effect so far, but this time Hazlewood finds the blockhole and bursts through.

short_text: Stoinis to Finn Allen, 1 run, oh there was a mix-up but Stoinis failed to gather it in his followthrough! This full deli
full_text: Stoinis to Finn Allen, 1 run, oh there was a mix-up but Stoinis failed to gather it in his followthrough! This full delivery was gently tapped to Stoinis's left, and the two batters were on their way for a single before being surprised that Stoinis was able to get to it. No harm done in the end as Stoinis misfields

short_text: Stoinis to Finn Allen, , the fifty comes up for New Zealand in just the fourth over as Allen smokes another one for a hu
full_text: Stoinis to Finn Allen, , the fifty comes up for New Zealand in just the fourth over as Allen smokes another one for a huge six! This is just incredible! Down the track he comes, right to the pitch and nails it with a clean swing

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 1 run, defends this off the front foot in front of mid-off

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, no run, slower length ball outside off, Conway looks for a cross-batted drive and chops it off a thick under-edge through to the keeper

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, no run, did he get some glove on this? No says the umpire. It's a sharp bouncer from Stoinis and Conway is beaten on the hook as it whistles over his right shoulder

full_text: Stoinis to Conway, 2 runs, pitched up outside off, driven through extra cover and Conway is back for two as sweeper cover cuts it off

short_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, might've been a slower one but once again it's runs for All
full_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, 2 runs, back of a length outside off, might've been a slower one but once again it's runs for Allen as he slaps it through the covers. Doesn't time it very well but finds the gap for a couple

short_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , short into the body and pulled away over square leg for a flat six! Allen on 33 off 12 balls an
full_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , short into the body and pulled away over square leg for a flat six! Allen on 33 off 12 balls and Australia are struggling to keep him quiet at the moment

short_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, no run, driven to cover
full_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, no run, driven to cover

short_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , this is just brilliant from Allen who continues to fly high! He steps out of the crease here, g
full_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , this is just brilliant from Allen who continues to fly high! He steps out of the crease here, gets to the pitch and hammers this down the ground over the infield

short_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , oh ! It bursts through Zampa's hands at short fine leg and runs away to the boundary. Allen is
full_text: Cummins to Finn Allen, , oh ! It bursts through Zampa's hands at short fine leg and runs away to the boundary. Allen is deceived by the slower bouncer, goes through the pull early, dragging it over short fine. Difficult chance for Zampa. It was going quickly over his head, and he reached out with both hands but couldn't hold on

short_text: Cummins to Conway, 1 run, flicked to deep midwicket
full_text: Cummins to Conway, 1 run, flicked to deep midwicket

short_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, , and another boundary! Allen puts on the dancing shoes, makes room and slashes this off a leng
full_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, , and another boundary! Allen puts on the dancing shoes, makes room and slashes this off a length through the covers

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, good length on off, Conway looks to defend and stabs it into the pitch. They get across for
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, good length on off, Conway looks to defend and stabs it into the pitch. They get across for the single

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, , this hasn't been timed all that well as Conway gets it high on the bat, but he still beats mid-of
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, , this hasn't been timed all that well as Conway gets it high on the bat, but he still beats mid-off for a boundary! Came charging out of the crease, the length was shorter than what he was looking for but still went through on the up

short_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, 1 run, short of length just outside off, Allen mistimes the pull through mid-wicket and Finch c
full_text: Hazlewood to Finn Allen, 1 run, short of length just outside off, Allen mistimes the pull through mid-wicket and Finch chases it down

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, back of a length on off, blocked gently into the off-side for a quick single
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, 1 run, back of a length on off, blocked gently into the off-side for a quick single

short_text: Hazlewood to Conway, , Hazlewood comes on and he concedes an early boundary as well. A cracking start for New Zealand. B
full_text: Hazlewood to Conway, , Hazlewood comes on and he concedes an early boundary as well. A cracking start for New Zealand. Back of a length on leg stump, Conway tucks it away fine and he beats the fielder at fine leg who's quite square

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, banged in short now, the line is leg-stumpish and Allen shuffles across to get inside the l
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, banged in short now, the line is leg-stumpish and Allen shuffles across to get inside the line before attempting the pull. He misses and it goes through to the keeper

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , Starc continues to pitch it up and Allen continues to hammer it! Half-volley on off stump, Allen
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , Starc continues to pitch it up and Allen continues to hammer it! Half-volley on off stump, Allen has the front leg cleared and he smashes it down the ground

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, full delivery outside off, Allen drives to mid-off
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, full delivery outside off, Allen drives to mid-off

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , That's gone deep into the stands as Allen smokes a full delivery over long-on. No swing for Starc
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , That's gone deep into the stands as Allen smokes a full delivery over long-on. No swing for Starc as he pitches it up again and disappears for an 87-meter hit

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , this time he goes over mid-on and New Zealand are up and running! Pitched up outside off again, i
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, , this time he goes over mid-on and New Zealand are up and running! Pitched up outside off again, it's close to a half-volley and Allen tonks it over the infield

short_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, pitched up outside off, not much swing, and Allen drives firmly to mid-on
full_text: Starc to Finn Allen, no run, pitched up outside off, not much swing, and Allen drives firmly to mid-on

short_text: Southee to Cummins, Caught by Conway!! That's the end of the match and it's only apt that Conway has the final say in th
full_text: Southee to Cummins, Caught by Conway!! That's the end of the match and it's only apt that Conway has the final say in the game - change of pace and it has undone another Australian batter, was the off-cutter and Cummins was way too early into his swing, skied it straight up, Conway called and Conway took the chance without any fuss. A 89-run thumping for New Zealand.

short_text: Boult to Cummins, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, punched down to long-off for a single
full_text: Boult to Cummins, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, punched down to long-off for a single

short_text: Boult to Cummins, no run, short of a good length and well wide of off, Cummins was looking to dab it down towards third
full_text: Boult to Cummins, no run, short of a good length and well wide of off, Cummins was looking to dab it down towards third man and missed

full_text: Boult to Hazlewood, 1 run, fuller length delivery on the pads, clipped away behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Boult to Zampa, Bowled!! This is getting over in a flash - looked like the cutter, was the knuckle ball - nipped back in
full_text: Boult to Zampa, Bowled!! This is getting over in a flash - looked like the cutter, was the knuckle ball - nipped back in late, Zampa had backed away on the inside out drive, gets beaten by the late movement and has his leg-stump clattered.

short_text: Boult to Zampa, no run, short of a length and angling across the right-hander, Zampa shuffled right across, was looking
full_text: Boult to Zampa, no run, short of a length and angling across the right-hander, Zampa shuffled right across, was looking to help it over the infield and missed

short_text: Boult to Starc, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Full and straight from Boult - Starc swings all over the place and missed, the ball
full_text: Boult to Starc, Bowled!! Cleaned up! Full and straight from Boult - Starc swings all over the place and missed, the ball clatters into the middle of middle-stump. Boult enjoyed that, do did New Zealand and their Trans-Tasman neighbours are heading towards a massive defeat.

short_text: Ferguson to Starc, 1 run, on a good length and well wide of off, drilled down to deep cover for a single
full_text: Ferguson to Starc, 1 run, on a good length and well wide of off, drilled down to deep cover for a single

full_text: Ferguson to Starc, no run, short of a good length and well wide of off, Starc slashes and misses

full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, 1 run, fuller length delivery at the stumps, punched down to long-off for a single

full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, no run, good comeback from Ferguson - followed Cummins with a pin-point yorker and Cummins can only jam it back at the bowler

full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, , , length ball angling into the right-hander, Cummins picks the length early, used Ferguson's pace and then whiplashed it over wide mid-wicket for a maximum

short_text: Ferguson to Cummins, , , back of a length and just outside off - Cummins stands tall and then punches it over extra-cove
full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, , , back of a length and just outside off - Cummins stands tall and then punches it over extra-cover, over the fielder and bounces away to the ropes, good start to the over

full_text: Boult to Cummins, 1 run, fuller length delivery on off, a check-drive down to long-on for a single

full_text: Boult to Starc, 1 run, slower short ball on off, pulled past square leg for a single

full_text: Boult to Cummins, leg byes, 1 run, fuller length delivery on the pads, Cummins whips and misses, lobbed off the pads to the off-side for a leg-bye

full_text: Boult to Cummins, , the attempted slower ball, but Boult has slid it wide of off, called by the umpire

full_text: Boult to Cummins, no run, slower ball outside off, Cummins swings across the line and is undone by the lack of pace and bounce, through to the keeper

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Starc, no run, the quicker wrong 'un, pushed through flatter and spinning away from off, Starc has a frail at that and missed

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Cummins, 1 run, tossed up invitingly around off, punched down to long-off for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Starc, 1 run, loopy delivery on off, eased down towards long-on for a single

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, Bowled!! That's the end for Australia - one switch-hit too many from Maxwell - changed track and w
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, Bowled!! That's the end for Australia - one switch-hit too many from Maxwell - changed track and was then looking to heave it over cover, but the ball slid past, curved beautifully and hit his leg-stump, which was left exposed. New Zealand all over Australia like a rash, it's not going to be a humbling, this is fast turning out to be a pasting for the hosts.

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Cummins, 1 run, another wrong 'un, spinning into the pads and it's flicked past mid-wicket for a single
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Cummins, 1 run, another wrong 'un, spinning into the pads and it's flicked past mid-wicket for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Cummins, , the wrong 'un from Sodhi, but it goes well down leg, called as a wide

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Cummins, no run, tossed up just outside off, pushed back at the bowler

full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, 1 run, another slower ball outside off, dragged away off the inner half of the bat, to the right of mid-on for a single

short_text: Ferguson to Cummins, no run, change of pace and Cummins is done in completely, was the cutter that kept coming in - Cumm
full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, no run, change of pace and Cummins is done in completely, was the cutter that kept coming in - Cummins was way too early into the shot and is beaten by a long way, didn't miss the off-stump by much

short_text: Ferguson to Cummins, , handy boundary for Cummins, he's an useful batter - length ball angling into the right-hander, Cu
full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, , handy boundary for Cummins, he's an useful batter - length ball angling into the right-hander, Cummins uses the angle and then heaves it backward of square on the on-side for a boundary

short_text: Ferguson to Cummins, no run, slower short ball outside off - Cummins is caught in a tangle, pokes at that, then looks to
full_text: Ferguson to Cummins, no run, slower short ball outside off - Cummins is caught in a tangle, pokes at that, then looks to leave, then has another poke and is well beaten, bounces through to the keeper

short_text: Ferguson to Wade, Caught by Conway!! Edged and caught! It's not happening for Australia, not at least tonight - on a goo
full_text: Ferguson to Wade, Caught by Conway!! Edged and caught! It's not happening for Australia, not at least tonight - on a good length and in that channel just outside off - Wade saw the width and threw his hands on the drive, gets a thick edge and Conway doesn't drop those. It's going from bad to worse for the defending champions.

short_text: Ferguson to Wade, no run, short of a good length, angling into the left-hander at , Wade plays from the crease and gets
full_text: Ferguson to Wade, no run, short of a good length, angling into the left-hander at , Wade plays from the crease and gets an inside edge onto his body

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Wade, 1 run, the wrong 'un now, but the length is short and it's cut away to deep cover for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, 1 run, the switch-hit once again, but Sodhi fired one down leg, dragged past cover for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, no run, slower and dragged down by Sodhi - Maxwell had backed away too far, reaches out on the cut and mistimes it back at the bowler

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, no run, pushed through around off - Maxwell backs away and finds cover with the punch

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, , . Maxwell finally gets hold of the switch-hit and sends it into the 2nd tier of SCG - changed his stance, got on top of the bounce and lofted it high and over cover

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, no run, .. and Maxwell will continue to play the reverse sweep, drags it behind square on the off-
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, no run, .. and Maxwell will continue to play the reverse sweep, drags it behind square on the off-side

full_text: Santner to Maxwell, 1 run, loopy delivery on off, driven down towards long-on for a single

short_text: Santner to Maxwell, no run, another attempted reverse sweep, but Santner saw it coming, darted it quicker and outside of
full_text: Santner to Maxwell, no run, another attempted reverse sweep, but Santner saw it coming, darted it quicker and outside off - he was through with the shot and the ball rolled to the off-side, off the back of the bat

short_text: Santner to Maxwell, , Maxwell will play his shots, , brings out the reverse sweep, rolled his wrists over and places it
full_text: Santner to Maxwell, , Maxwell will play his shots, , brings out the reverse sweep, rolled his wrists over and places it fine, beats short third man and runs away to the ropes

short_text: Santner to Wade, 1 run, tossed up on off, driven down towards long-off for a single
full_text: Santner to Wade, 1 run, tossed up on off, driven down towards long-off for a single

short_text: Santner to Tim David, Caught by Neesham!! Six and OUT - Santner is having a night to remember, dragged the length back,
full_text: Santner to Tim David, Caught by Neesham!! Six and OUT - Santner is having a night to remember, dragged the length back, but it's short and David's eyes lit up on the pull, but it's the spin that does the job, spins away from his reach and he can't get anywhere near the middle of the bat. Hit it flat and hard, but straight down deep mid-wicket's throat, Neesham sliding in, went with soft hands and held on. Australia have lost half their side and looking awfully bad at the moment.

short_text: Santner to Tim David, , , sheer power from David - flighted delivery outside off , he shuffles across and then hacks the
full_text: Santner to Tim David, , , sheer power from David - flighted delivery outside off , he shuffles across and then hacks the slog-sweep over mid-wicket, went flat and over the ropes

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, , , class from Maxwell - backs away to a well flighted delivery , opens the face of the bat at the
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, , , class from Maxwell - backs away to a well flighted delivery , opens the face of the bat at the last moment and goes inside out over cover with the drive, one bounce and over the ropes

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tim David, 1 run, flighted around the off-stump line, David shuffles across, rolled his wrists and swept it backward of square on the on-side for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, 1 run, Sodhi tosses one wide of off, driven down towards long-off for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tim David, 1 run, nicely bowled, David was clueless on this leg-break, closed the bat-face on the flick, gets a thick edge that runs through the vacant slip region for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Tim David, no run, nicely tossed up outside off, David gets a good stride forward and finds cover with the drive

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, 1 run, Maxwell brings out the reverse sweep, rolled his wrists over and finds the fielder at deep backward point, only a single

full_text: Santner to Maxwell, 1 run, tossed up well outside off, driven down towards long-off for a single

full_text: Santner to Tim David, 1 run, this is such good bowling from Santner - flighted delivery on off, slower through the air, drew David forward and then dipped under him, catching the inside edge on the drive, behind square on the on-side for a single

short_text: Santner to Tim David, 2 runs, dropped short and wide of off, slapped away backward of square on the off-side and David i
full_text: Santner to Tim David, 2 runs, dropped short and wide of off, slapped away backward of square on the off-side and David is back for the second run

short_text: Santner to Tim David, no run, flighted delivery on off, punched off the back-foot to cover-point
full_text: Santner to Tim David, no run, flighted delivery on off, punched off the back-foot to cover-point

short_text: Santner to Stoinis, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! What a catch! What a sensational catch from Phillips, and that's another
full_text: Santner to Stoinis, Caught by Glenn Phillips!! What a catch! What a sensational catch from Phillips, and that's another big blow for Australia. and it couldn't be anyone other than Glenn Phillps - acrobatic at his best - slower and just outside off, Stoinis made room and was looking to go inside out over cover with the drive, chipped it in the air, was well wide of the fielder at sweeper and would have dropped safely, but Phillips ran across from the deep, threw himself at the ball, went two-handed and held onto an absolute stormer, ensured that it didn't pop out as he hit the turf.

short_text: Santner to Stoinis, no run, nicely bowled, slowed down the pace and dropped one wlel outside off - Stoinis was shaping f
full_text: Santner to Stoinis, no run, nicely bowled, slowed down the pace and dropped one wlel outside off - Stoinis was shaping for the sweep and missed

short_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, , this was coming, the pressure was getting onto both batters, and out comes Maxwell's switch-hit
full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, , this was coming, the pressure was getting onto both batters, and out comes Maxwell's switch-hit - reverses the stance and then drags the pull over cover-point, the fielder in the deep is very square and has no chance

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Stoinis, 1 run, pushed through around middle and leg, worked down to long-on for a run

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Maxwell, 1 run, Sodhi drops one short and just outside off - Maxwell backs away and drills the drive down to long-off for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Stoinis, 1 run, flighted delivery on the leg-stump line, tucked Stoinis for room and he can only push it wide of mid-wicket for a single

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Stoinis, 2 runs, dropped short by Sodhi - Stoinis rocks back and places the pull wide of mid-wicket, comes back for the second run

full_text: Ish Sodhi to Stoinis, no run, flighted delivery on the leg-stump line, Stoinis stays back and pushes it back at the bowler

full_text: Santner to Stoinis, 1 run, loopy delivery wide of off, driven to the right of cover where KW makes a tumbling stop, keeps them down to a single

short_text: Santner to Stoinis, no run, Santner slows down the pace and went wider of off, Stoinis was looking to come forward, goes
full_text: Santner to Stoinis, no run, Santner slows down the pace and went wider of off, Stoinis was looking to come forward, goes back and miscues the cut to the off-side

full_text: Santner to Stoinis, 1 run, nice changes in pace from Santner, threw one slower and wider of off - Stoinis  had to reach out on the cut and under-edged it past the keeper for a single

full_text: Santner to Stoinis, no run, loopy delivery outside off, Stoinis went down on a pre-meditated slog-sweep and missed, didn't miss the off-stump by much

full_text: Santner to Maxwell, 1 run, tossed up on off, worked down to long-on for a single, was looking for a second there, but Maxwell slipped while turning back

full_text: Ferguson to Stoinis, no run, BI0$ short of length on off, Stoinis defends with soft hands to point

full_text: Ferguson to Stoinis, no run, BI0$ fullish delivery around off, Stoinis toe-ends the drive towards point

full_text: Ferguson to Maxwell, 1 run, attacks the stumps with a full delivery, Maxwell turns it to mid-on and gets off the mark

full_text: Southee to Stoinis, no run, good length ball around off, Stoinis tucks it to mid-wicket

short_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, Caught by Neesham!! Australia in tatters. They have lost their top three inside the first fiv
full_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, Caught by Neesham!! Australia in tatters. They have lost their top three inside the first five overs. Southee picks up his second and has been impressive. Slower ball and Marsh is completely deceived, he's through the heave early and skies it towards deep mid-wicket, Neesham runs around to his left and hangs on to a good catch.

short_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, big shout for LBW. Southee was very confident. Williamson has a word and decides agai
full_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, big shout for LBW. Southee was very confident. Williamson has a word and decides against the review. Off-cutter and the ball breaks in, beats Marsh's swing and strikes him on the back thigh. Height was an issue and that saved Marsh

short_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, I0$ good length ball and Marsh checks his shot, pops it wide of Southee and safely dr
full_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, I0$ good length ball and Marsh checks his shot, pops it wide of Southee and safely drops into the off-side

short_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, , that's a poor delivery and easy pickings for Marsh. Leg-lined and is helped along the way o
full_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, , that's a poor delivery and easy pickings for Marsh. Leg-lined and is helped along the way over short fine leg

short_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, I0$ back of a length around off, Marsh defends it to Southee
full_text: Southee to Mitchell Marsh, no run, I0$ back of a length around off, Marsh defends it to Southee

short_text: Santner to Finch, Caught by Williamson!! Finch's poor run continues.. He backs away to repeat Marsh's inside out loft bu
full_text: Santner to Finch, Caught by Williamson!! Finch's poor run continues.. He backs away to repeat Marsh's inside out loft but Santner kept this much closer, not much room for Finch to free his arms and hence does not get the elevation to get it over the infield, struck it hard and straight to Williamson at extra cover. The Kiwi skipper reverse cups it and lands on his back.

short_text: Southee to Warner, Bowled!! Dragged on! Warner cannot believe it and hangs his head back immediately. Couple of deflecti
full_text: Southee to Warner, Bowled!! Dragged on! Warner cannot believe it and hangs his head back immediately. Couple of deflections takes the ball onto the stumps and Warner walks off with a wry smile on his face. This was not short enough to play the pull, but Warner is crouching low and attempting the shot, the inside edge hits the pad and then pops onto the bat's followthrough, hits the edge and drops onto the stumps.
